title: Silicone Sling Frontalis Suspension for Correction of Congenital Blepharoptosis
author: Saroj Gupta
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: There are many techniques for treating congenital blepharoptosis. A new surgical technique for ptosis with poor levator function in which Seiff Silicone Suspension set is used in frontalis sling procedure is described in a 12 year old female child with simple unilateral congenital blepharoptosis. This procedure requires less surgical time, provides good cosmesis and early recovery.
steps_raw: There are many techniques for treating congenital blepharoptosis.
